data.content: Implemented the single-CLI scan fix on branch foolery-67b5 at commit a1c2b2f14449. Root cause was the FOUND_AGENTS==1 fast path in scripts/setup.sh and scripts/agent-wizard.sh bypassing discovered-model selection and forcing a single default registration. The single-agent flow now reuses _collect_discovered_models, registers one entry per selected model, falls back to the base CLI entry when zero models are selected, and only auto-maps actions when exactly one registered entry remains; otherwise it prompts for action mappings across the selected model variants. Added scripts/test-install-copilot-setup-single-cli.sh to cover the installed-launcher PTY flow with only Copilot on PATH selecting two models in one scan session. Validation passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, plus bun test src/lib/__tests__/setup-settings-writer.test.ts and scripts/test-install-copilot-setup-single-cli.sh.
